title: Cahiers
description: Cashiers are responsible for processing customer transactions accurately while maintaining a friendly demeanor. They handle cash, credit card payments, and operate point-of-sale systems to ensure smooth checkout experiences for customers.

title: Stockers
description: Stockers are responsible for replenishing shelves with products, ensuring they are well-organized and properly displayed. They also check inventory levels, rotate stock to prevent expired items, and maintain a clean and tidy shopping environment.

title: Packers
description: Packers assist with bagging groceries at checkout, ensuring items are packed efficiently and securely for customers. They may also help with organizing and preparing products for delivery or storage, ensuring proper handling of goods.

title: Merchandisers
description: Merchandisers are responsible for arranging products attractively on shelves to maximize sales and enhance the customer shopping experience. They ensure product displays are stocked, rotated, and aligned with promotional strategies while also tracking inventory levels.

title: Chefs
description: Chefs prepares fresh, ready-to-eat meals and specialty dishes for customers, ensuring high quality and food safety standards. They may also develop recipes, manage kitchen operations, and assist with product promotions or in-store cooking demonstrations.

title: Butchers
description: A butcher cuts, trims, and prepares various types of meat according to customer requests, ensuring quality and safety standards are met. They also manage inventory, display products attractively, and provide expert advice on meat selection and cooking methods.

title: E-commerce Agents
description: E-commerce agents manage online orders, ensuring accurate processing, packing, and timely delivery or pickup for customers. They handle customer inquiries, resolve issues, and help maintain smooth digital shopping operations.

title: Delivery Agents
description: Delivery agents are responsible for transporting orders to customers homes quickly and safely, ensuring timely and efficient deliveries. They also verify order accuracy, follow delivery routes, and maintain the condition of the products during transit.

title: We are looking for a Manager, Product Management to lead product management across a growing portfolio of digital health innovations. This is a hands-on leadership role spanning product strategy, cross-functional stakeholder management, and team leadership. Working within an established innovation governance framework, the successful candidate will collaborate with program, engineering, and country teams to shape and manage the product roadmap for priority initiatives. Current projects include an application for community health supervisors, agentic workflow tools, a Direct-to-Beneficiary health platform, e-Learning solutions, and other emerging digital health solutions. These products span different stages of maturity, from early design and testing through to scale-readiness, requiring strong portfolio thinking and the ability to make evidence-driven decisions about when to continue, adapt, or stop an initiative.
description: Details for We are looking for a Manager, Product Management to lead product management across a growing portfolio of digital health innovations. title: We are looking for a Product Manager to support delivery across our portfolio of digital health innovations. This is an execution-focused role embedded in the product development cycle, working closely with the Manager, Product Management, engineering teams, field users, and program stakeholders. The successful candidate will own the day-to-day product work that turns requirements into shipped, tested features — writing requirements, managing backlogs, coordinating delivery, and ensuring the team always has well-defined work to execute against. The role spans products at different stages of maturity, from early prototyping to scale preparation, requiring strong organisational skills and curiosity about emerging digital health solutions.
